parameters.jsCode:
return {
  title: `${$json.topic} – ${$json.jobrole_title}`,
  request_item_id: $json.request_item_id,
  jobrole_id: $json.jobrole_id,
  jobrole_title: $json.jobrole_title,
  interest_topics: $json.interest_topics,
  interest_keywords: $json.interest_keywords,
  context_focus: $json.context_focus,
  context_link: $json.context_link,
  Exclusion_Topics: $json.Exclusion_Topics,
  primary_goal: $json.primary_goal,
  perspective: $json.perspective,
  tonality: $json.tonality,
  Pain_Points: $json.Pain_Points,
  Gains: $json.Gains,
  Value_Hook: $json.Value_Hook,
  Do_Not: $json.Do_Not,
  Call_to_Action_Stil: $json.Call_to_Action_Stil,
  role_focus: $json.role_focus,
  topic: $json.topic,
  context_note: $json.context_note,
  language: $json.language,
  relevance_match: $json.relevance_match,
  match_reason: `keywordMatch=${$json.match_debug?.keywordMatch ?? false}, 
  focusMatch=${$json.match_debug?.focusMatch ?? false}`,
  created_at: new Date().toISOString()
};

parameters.text: =Create a role-specific LinkedIn carousel post based on the provided topic and role profile./nUse the following input dimensions:/n- topic/n- optional context link/n- optional context note/n- language/n- job role title/n- role focus/n- perspective/n- tonality/n- pain points/n- gains/n- value hook/n- primary goal/n- context focus/n- relevant interest topics and keywords/n- exclusion topics/n- call-to-action style/nGeneration requirements:/n- produce a LinkedIn carousel draft/n- adapt framing and wording to the selected role/n- incorporate relevant context if available/n- respect exclusion criteria and content guardrails/n- keep the post practical, role-specific, and audience-relevant/n- avoid unsupported claims/n- no emojis/n- no aggressive sales language/nOutput format:/n- carousel format only/n- 6–9 slides/n- each slide with a short headline and concise supporting lines

options.systemMessage: You are a professional B2B LinkedIn content assistant./nYour task is to generate a role-specific LinkedIn carousel draft based on structured business and audience inputs./nRules:/n- use only the provided context/n- do not invent facts/n- do not generalize beyond the input/n- adapt tone, framing, and perspective to the selected role/n- keep the text factual, practical, and audience-aware/n- no emojis/n- no aggressive calls to action/n- respect exclusion rules and guardrails/n- output carousel format only

parameters.content: ## Automated LinkedIn-Postings for different Jobroles and different topics (endless scaleable)

parameters.jsCode:
return {
  json: {
    fields: {
      Title: String($json.title ?? ''),
      request_item_id: String($json.request_item_id ?? ''),
      jobrole_id: String($json.jobrole_id ?? ''),
      jobrole_title: String($json.jobrole_title ?? ''),
      interest_topics: String($json.interest_topics ?? '')
                     .replace(/"/g, "'") // Äußere Anführungszeichen durch einfache ersetzen
                     .replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' '), // Zeilenumbrüche durch Leerzeichen ersetzen
      interest_keywords: String($json.interest_keywords ?? ''),

      context_focus: Array.isArray($json.context_focus)
        ? $json.context_focus.join(', ')
        : String($json.context_focus ?? ''),

      Exclusion_Topics: String($json.Exclusion_Topics ?? ''),
      primary_goal: String($json.primary_goal ?? ''),

      perspective: Array.isArray($json.perspective)
        ? $json.perspective.join(', ')
        : String($json.perspective ?? ''),

      tonality: Array.isArray($json.tonality)
        ? $json.tonality.join(', ')
        : String($json.tonality ?? ''),

      Pain_Points: String($json.Pain_Points ?? ''),
      Gains: String($json.Gains ?? ''),
      Value_Hook: String($json.Value_Hook ?? ''),
      Do_Not: String($json.Do_Not ?? ''),
      Call_to_Action_Stil: String($json.Call_to_Action_Stil ?? ''),
      role_focus: String($json.role_focus ?? ''),
      topic: String($json.topic ?? ''),
      context_note: String($json.context_note ?? ''),
      context_link: $json.context_link?.Url
        ? String($json.context_link.Url).trim()
        : '',
      language: String($json.language ?? ''),

      relevance_match: Boolean($json.relevance_match ?? false),
      match_reason: String($json.match_reason ?? ''),
      created_at: String($json.created_at ?? '')
    }
  }
};

parameters.toolDescription: Use this tool exactly once to research additional market insights if the context_link is insufficient. Accept the first result as final.
